2604.16256.title: Do Vision-Language Models Truly Perform Vision Reasoning? A Rigorous Study of the Modality Gap
2604.16256.paper_summary: Reasoning in vision-language models (VLMs) has recently attracted significant attention due to its broad applicability across diverse downstream tasks. However, it remains unclear whether the superior performance of VLMs stems from genuine vision-grounded reasoning or relies predominantly on the reasoning capabilities of their textual backbones. To systematically measure this, we introduce CrossMath, a novel multimodal reasoning benchmark designed for controlled cross-modal comparisons. Specifically, we construct each problem in text-only, image-only, and image+text formats guaranteeing identical task-relevant information, verified by human annotators. This rigorous alignment effectively isolates modality-specific reasoning differences while eliminating confounding factors such as information mismatch. Extensive evaluation of state-of-the-art VLMs reveals a consistent phenomenon: a substantial performance gap between textual and visual reasoning. Notably, VLMs excel with text-only inputs, whereas incorporating visual data (image+text) frequently degrades performance compared to the text-only baseline. These findings indicate that current VLMs conduct reasoning primarily in the textual space, with limited genuine reliance on visual evidence. To mitigate this limitation, we curate a CrossMath training set for VLM fine-tuning. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that fine-tuning on this training set significantly boosts reasoning performance across all individual and joint modalities, while yielding robust gains on two general visual reasoning tasks. Source code is available at https://github.com/xuyige/CrossMath.
2604.16256.paper_summary_zh: 視覺-語言模型（VLMs）中的推理最近因其在多樣下游任務中的廣泛應用而受到重大關注。<lb/>然而，目前尚不清楚 VLMs 的卓越性能是否源於真正的視覺基礎推理，或主要依賴於其文本骨幹的推理能力。<lb/>為了系統性地測量這一點，我們引入了 CrossMath，一個新穎的多模態推理基準，旨在進行受控的跨模態比較。<lb/>具體而言，我們構建了每個問題的文本僅、圖像僅和圖像+文本格式，保證相同的任務相關信息，並經過人工標註者的驗證。<lb/>這種嚴格的對齊有效地隔離了模態特定的推理差異，同時消除了信息不匹配等混淆因素。<lb/>對最先進的 VLMs 的廣泛評估顯示出一個一致的現象：文本推理和視覺推理之間存在顯著的性能差距。<lb/>值得注意的是，VLMs 在僅使用文本輸入時表現優異，而引入視覺數據（圖像+文本）通常會使性能相較於僅使用文本的基準下降。<lb/>這些發現表明，目前的 VLMs 主要在文本空間中進行推理，對視覺證據的真正依賴有限。<lb/>為了減輕這一限制，我們為 VLM 微調策劃了一個 CrossMath 訓練集。<lb/>實證評估表明，在這個訓練集上進行微調顯著提升了所有單一和聯合模態的推理性能，同時在兩個通用視覺推理任務上獲得了穩健的增益。<lb/>源代碼可在 https://github.com/xuyige/CrossMath 獲得。
2604.16256.author: Yige Xu et.al.
2604.16256.authors: Yige Xu, Yongjie Wang, Zizhuo Wu, Kaisong Song, Jun Lin, Zhiqi Shen
